report.summary: Cycle-close: 2 new build-fix commits since last cycle (WhaleWatchClient + 4-page client/server split), all 6 API routes structurally healthy with correct cache TTLs, rate limiting still unwired, 100/349 published slugs missing page.tsx — no regressions introduced.

sections.title: QA Tester — Page & Build Verification
items: 2 new commits since last cycle: aa190c8 (add missing WhaleWatchClient.tsx — 401 lines) and 538e7e4 (split 4 more pages with use-client + metadata conflict). Both are build-fix commits.
349 total published slugs audited — 249 have page.tsx files, 100 still missing (28.7% gap, unchanged from last cycle).
TypeScript check: 40 errors — ALL in src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts (documentation-only file, not imported in production). Zero errors in production code paths.
ignoreBuildErrors: true in next.config.ts ensures TS doc errors don't block Vercel builds.
No new regressions detected — both commits are additive (new component + page splits) and structurally sound.
Lint config still misconfigured (next lint looks for ./lint directory). Non-blocking carry-over.

sections.title: Data Engineer — API Route Health
items: All 6 public API routes verified present with correct cache configurations:
/api/prices (60s TTL, ISR 60s) — has fallback data ✓
/api/defi-yields (variable TTL, stale-while-revalidate) — NO fallback data ✗
/api/fear-greed (600s TTL, s-maxage=600) — NO fallback data ✗
/api/trending (300s TTL, s-maxage=300) — NO fallback data ✗
/api/market-metrics (60s TTL, revalidate=120) — NO fallback data ✗
/api/market-dominance (300s TTL, ISR 300s) — has fallback data ✓
Rate limiting: STILL unwired on all 6 public routes. Only /api/cache-stats and /api/health import checkRateLimit. This is a persistent carry-over since Day 13.
Cache headers (stale-while-revalidate) correctly configured across all routes. X-Cache-Source headers present where implemented.

sections.title: DevOps — Deployment Status
items: Latest commit: aa190c8 (Fix build: add missing WhaleWatchClient.tsx) pushed at 10:18 UTC+1 today.
Vercel project: cryptodegen (prj_2Hn4Kdtu6fM13sSpxsdnmsJWGI75). Git-connected auto-deploy pipeline.
Build config verified: output=standalone, trailingSlash=true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=4, workerThreads=false, ignoreBuildErrors=true — all correct.
Middleware present at root (middleware.ts, 3.9KB) — handles X-Robots-Tag, cache, and security headers at edge.
No error spikes or performance regressions from today's commits — all are additive build fixes (component additions + page splits).
Local full builds not feasible in VM (OOM). Vercel builds run on dedicated 8GB+ infrastructure.

sections.title: Project Manager — Cycle Summary
items: SHIPPED this cycle: 2 build-fix commits — WhaleWatchClient.tsx component (aa190c8) + 4-page client/server metadata split (538e7e4).
Total commits today: 3 (including e36d391 from prior cycle — market-recap split + apostrophe fixes).
CARRY-OVER: Rate limiting unwired on all 6 public API routes (Day 13 → Day 16, escalating).
CARRY-OVER: 4/6 API routes lack fallback data (defi-yields, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics).
CARRY-OVER: 100/349 published slugs missing page.tsx — needs triage on which are planned vs orphaned.
CARRY-OVER: Lint config misconfigured (next lint → ./lint directory).
BLOCKED (Jefe): WalletConnect production Project ID for wallet connections.
BLOCKED (Jefe): GitHub Actions secrets for Playwright CI automation.
NEXT CYCLE: Wire rate limiting (top priority — organic traffic imminent), add fallback data to 4 API routes, triage 100 missing page.tsx files.
